Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
TD Garden
Boston, MA
Previous Names:
FleetCenter (Changed after 2005)
TD Banknorth Garden (Changed after 2009)
Seating Capacity: 19600
Venue Type : Indoor Arena

Total Gigs: 11
  DMB  (10)
  Dave & Friends  (1)

Longest Performance:
12.15.05 - Seek Up (24:12)

Song Liberations
  12.7.18 – Christmas Song (after 1623 days)
Venue Picture
Description
On September 29, 1995, the old Garden closed its doors to the public for the last time with an evening of entertainment. The following night, a gala was held at the new FleetCenter, to usher in a new era for sports and entertainment in New England. Many of the historical reminders from the old structure were moved next door to the state-of-the-art FleetCenter. In 2004-05, the venue went through several name-changing issues, before finally settling on TD Banknorth Garden.

100 Legends Way
Boston, MA 02114
